feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP MDG Changing worklist content failed mass processing
entry.content:
Hi

When i'm executing the "Manage Mass Processes - Business Partner or Material"  i'm getting the error message: "Changing worklist content failed". 

I applied this note :  https://me.sap.com/notes/0003481759

 but  error still persists.

 

Do you have recommendation?

entry.title: SAP EHP8 - Vendor Master Data
SAP MDG: Steps to Configure Document Types ?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to add the documents in the UIBB  ERP Documents while creating a business partner. I have two issues here.

One is that I can see only two document types if I try to add a document.
Second one is even if I select anyone out of it, it goes into the dump.

Can someone please help me out with the detailed process of configuring document types, add documents and make them flow to SAP.

Thanks, 
Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: Interval / Does not exit for object MATERIALNR
entry.content:
While creating the change request for Article master we are facing the above mentioned error. but we can able to create the Article using SAP GUI.  we facing error only when we tried to create Article master using the MDG UI.

 

Thanks in advance

best Answer will be Rewarded.

entry.title: SAP MDG Parallel Change Requests for Material Enrichment Success Stories
entry.content:
Dear fellow SAP MDG specialists, 

Has anyone ever implemented the Parallel MDG Change Request Concept (not to be confused with parallel Workflow Work Items within the same CR!) in MDG for material master (or other objects) enrichment as part of a new record creation process? If so, can you please share your experience? The capability is well documented by SAP but I have not personally seen it implemented yet. 

Business scenario: A company follows a guiding principle in a material master creation process where the knowledge holders need to enrich the data with the correct attribute values in MDG CRs. Some of these business roles / workflow agents are plant-specific (e.g. Planning Data Expert). The company's material master creation solution today consists of several follow-up CRs, some with parallel workflow items (grouped by functional domains within a material). Today the company creates and extends materials for one plant at a time (in a single record creation scenario). However, in the future they would like to be able to create and enrich materials for multiple plants in a single process iteration. The challenge is that because they have plant specific roles, a large number of workflow agents would need to be involved in the enrichment process. One of the options the company is considering is using parallel MDG CRs (one per plant) during the material enrichment process. In this case an initial CR with a list of plants would trigger parallel follow-up CRs for plant-specific enrichment. 

Any insights or alternatives would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Is it possible to completely remove / delete unused RefOps?
entry.content:
We have RefOps that are no longer used, and there are no Routings linked / using them.

We would like to do a clean up and get rid of everything that is not being used.

Is this even possible?  I am struggling to find any info regarding this subject.

Any info would be great.

entry.title: How to perform Master data cleansing activity
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are in the process of cleansing the Material, Vendor, and Customer masters in our S4/HANA platform. I would like to get some expert advice on the points mentioned below.

1. How to categorize the cleansing process (phases)? 

2. What are the most important fields in the Vendor, Customer, and Material masters that we must consider and cleanse?

3.  What are the tables that need to be used to extract the data for the above masters?

4. How to perform the cleansing activities?

5. How to maintain a proper master data creation practice in the future?

Regards,

Kasun

entry.title: SAP MDG on Premise how to enhance the class cl_bs_bp_guibb_tax_numbers for customers
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to add a button on Customer Main Page, I have already created the customization and extended the View, but I need to know how to enhance the class 

cl_bs_bp_guibb_tax_numbers 

to use my custom process_event method to handle the button behavior.

Thanks,

Riccardo

entry.title: Change the "link to action" field in SEARCH_GUIBB_RESULT
entry.content:
Hi 

I am using a SEARCH_GUIBB_RESULT class to display the result of custom object selection in MDG. In this list I have the link to action field (the entity key) and it works fine.

In the result list I need to change the field as link to the single object, the user has to click on the description instead of the code to open the single object page.

How is possible to change the link to action field?

Thanks and Regards

Antonio

entry.title: Replicating House Bank Data from S4 to S4 - IDOC not getting generated for BAMMAST
entry.content:
House Bank data flow was active from S4 to ECC - Message Type HBHBAMAST. Recently upgrade ECC system to S4, now the data flow from S4 to S4 . As per SAP, two message types to configure i.e. BAMMAST and HBHBAMAST.  HBHBAMAST working as expected for all the options as per screen shot below. BAMMAST does NOT trigger any IDOC with filters(DRFF). Please find the details below.  

Transaction DRFOUT - BAMMAST/HBHBMAST works as expected with options "initialization" and "Manual". 

With "Changes" option  - Works ok with out filters however not consistent; With Filters using DRFF, BAMMAST does NOT trigger any IDOC. 

I would value your insights on this matter.

Thank You for your time.

entry.title: One Sold to party and multiple payers in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi everybody

I have a scenario where a client have multiple payers for one sold to party . In billing document , we would have payment  example : from payee X for 50% , from payee Y for 30% payee Z for 20% .

How can we manage that in MDG ( partner function ?) and SD ? ( S/4HANA 2021)

Thanks in advance for your return

Ganesh

entry.title: SAP MDG: How to make grey / non-editable any fields on UI ?
entry.content:
Hi SCN People, 

 

How to make any of the fields in UI (grey / non-editable) based on Field. 

Any Inputs or resources will be helpful.

 

Thank You, 
Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: No Editions Avaliable on GL account crreation in SAP MDG
entry.content:
Hi,

Warning Message is Triggering "No Editions Avaliable"  on GL account crreation in SAP MDG. Anyone have idea and give solutions to avoid this message.  Provide me solution. Thanks in Advance to team.

Thanks&Regards,

ChiyaanRavi

entry.title: Import data for consolidation - products Error in file upload
entry.content:
I am using Import data for Consolidations - Products app . But when I upload the file i am getting error that "Loads exhibits no valid content " . I have done all checks and I am using the template file which is provided by SAP .

I also copied the content of file to Notepad++ and I see there is no problem - each line in excel is copied as separate line in Notepad++ .

Any hints on what is going wrong in this file upload as there is no clear description of error

entry.title: Validation of supplier in SAP MDG
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

I want to get the warning message for supplier if more than one bank account is added in bank accounts entity. But I'm getting warning message after entering Bank country/Region, Bank key of second bank account.

Please find below code for the same:

DATA : lv_row_index     TYPE i VALUE 0.


    cl_usmd_app_context=>get_context( )->get_attributes(
                  IMPORTING
                    ev_crequest_id = DATA(lv_cr_num6)                     "CR Number
                    ev_crequest_type  = DATA(lv_cr_type6)                 " Type of Change Request
                ).
    IF lv_cr_type6 = 'ZSUPP1' OR lv_cr_type6 = 'ZSUPP2'.

      IF id_entitytype = 'BP_BKDTL'.
        LOOP AT it_data ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_data>).
          IF <fs_data> IS ASSIGNED.
            lv_row_index = lv_row_index + 1.
          ENDIF.
          IF lv_row_index > 1.
            message-msgid = 'ZMDG'.
            message-msgty = 'W'.
            message-msgno = '008'.
            APPEND message TO et_message.
          ENDIF.
        ENDLOOP.

      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.

Anyone please suggest which code changes should i need to do for getting warning message without entering Bank country/region, bank key for second bank details id.

entry.title: Dynamic Agent (Parallel) Keeping Approver on Hold
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Need your help to build a code when requestor enter sales org, tax and finance it should be routed to all 3 approver ((Parallel) - finance / sales approver approved it and tax approver send for revision it, here it should go to requestor and requestor resubmit which is common requirement.

But here we want, When requestor resubmit it should only go to tax approver who send for revision not to finance/sales for approver because they already approved it and once tax approver approved it should trigger MERGE BADI (Parallel BADI). Somewhere we need to keep finance/sales approver keep on hold because it is already completed action and once tax approver approved it should trigger MERGE BADI (Parallel BADI).

entry.title: Change document not showing latest CR for business partner in 'Display change document' in SAP MDG.
entry.content:
Hi experts,

User has created one CR which is final check approved with some changes in business partner. But it's not showing under 'Display change document' on NWBC for that business partner. If we open the change request and then go to the change document, we are able to see the change log. What could be the reason behind this?

SAP Master Data Governance SAP S/4HANA business partner

entry.title: Mass update of BSEG/STCEG?
entry.content:
Hello, is there a way to mass update missing VAT IDs on SD documents - BSEG/STCEG?

THank you!

entry.title: Activate change pointer for alternative CCH
entry.content:
Hi Guru, 

I hope you are are all doing well. 

may i request for your expertise and help on this topic : 

I would like to activate change pointer for alternative cost center hierarchy.

now we are able to fill BDCP2 with idoc COGRP1 but only when we update the standard hierarchy. not nothing happened when we update the alternative hierarchy. 

The point is that we would like to have automatic transport of the Alt CCH each time it is updated.  

All custo has been done as we can manage standard hierarchy. 

Please note that your help would be very well appreciate. 

Thank you in advance.  

Regardes 

Lelo.

entry.title: DRF - Business Partner replication - disable confirmation message
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have a question or an issue with Business Partner distribution. We would like to disable the confirmation message to reduce the message load. I have deactivated the corresponding services on the receiver side.

BUSINESSPARTNERSUITEBULKREPLI1

BUSINESSPARTNERRELATIONSHIPSU1

Now we receive the following error on the receiver side: "Error creating the confirmation message: ABAP.PRX_PROTO_NOT_SUPPORTED Proxy protocol for K"

Is it really necessary to enable the confirmation message? Or do you know a way to disable the message?

Thank you in advance,

Stefan
